title: MakeSense
description: Were able to create machines, weapons, and magic, but not nametags and bells? Now we can... Just makes sense, right?
body:
As a player, we can craft tools, machines, to portals! Yet... we can't create
simple things such as Nametags & Bells? Doesn't make much sense, does it?

From Scrappable Leather Armor to Craftable Bells, to Heating up the Raw Ore Blocks to the actual block! There are also a few easier ways to make recipes, and lessen the amount of material you use, such as lantern recipes requiring the nugget instead of the iron bar! Here's to making it easier on the player!

(You may add this to any Modpacks / Videos!)

Do not upload this to any other mod website without permission of the Author (JTMessenger) However feel free to use it in any Modpack or Server! Join the Discord for any questions about this mod or be updated with the latest!
Showcase of BreakTheFall 2.0 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BTTOqB6Upp4
